token_optimization_status: Use local status JSON and 8805 API instead of rereading historic handover.
Use local scheduled workers for routine status, prediction and publishing.
Keep long ScarFLIX validation detached under local controller ownership.
overall_timeline_estimate: First major milestone: 1-3 days depending on PlatformGate/provider result.

outcomes.target: Full streaming, rich tool calling, traces, autonomous worker triggering, voice and persistent memory.
outcomes.current: 8805 Node brain online; 8791 reachable; local tools/status exposed.

outcomes.target: Growth beyond 78 items with alternate-source retry and verified Plex playback.
outcomes.eta: after PlatformGate and candidate model PASS

outcomes.target: Dynamic local plugin registry and natural-language action routing.
Daily autonomous proposals and controlled implementation backlog.
Parallel local workers for simulations, status, planning and future missions.
outcomes.current: Short scheduled workers active; broader worker swarm pending.

outcomes.target: Stable remote status/control through public mirror plus tunnel/federation layer.
outcomes.current: Public mirror PASS; raw status base available.

outcomes.target: JasonOS Prime local AI command layer with ScarFLIX as Mission 001.
outcomes.current: Core services online; current ScarFLIX bottleneck is same-snapshot PlatformGate.
outcomes.eta: first major milestone after PlatformGate + controlled expansion
